creator: koobs@FreeBSD.org
text:
@Brian Can you provide a screenshot of the crash/panic message and/or a backtrace of the crash? 

Additionally, please provide:

 - Exact/full FreeBSD version information (uname -a output)
 - /var/run/dmesg.boot contents (as an attachment)
 - pciconf -lv output (as an attachment)

Without that information and steps to reproduce it will be difficult to isolate/resolve

See also: https://www.freebsd.org/doc/en/books/developers-handbook/kerneldebug.html
